title: Taste Fatigue
description: New foods aren’t just novelties or one-offs
body:
Bug reports and suggestions are always welcome!
[taste-fatigue-1-21-1-neoforge](https://github.com/juejuecat/taste-fatigue-1-21-1-neoforge)
[taste-fatigue-1-20-1-forge](https://github.com/juejuecat/taste-fatigue-1-20-1-forge)
Taste Fatigue adds a “food disgust” layer to Minecraft 1.21.1 NeoForge, turning every meal into a strategic choice:

• Per-food disgust tracking

Each time you eat a specific food, its disgust counter increases by 1; the counter automatically decreases by 1 every 10 minutes.

• Real-time feedback

When you start eating, the current disgust value and an emoji appear in the top-left corner, so you always know your status.

• Configurable stages and effects

The default configuration splits disgust into five tiers: 0–10, 11–30, 31–40, 41–50, and 50+.

Each tier controls:

– Eating duration multiplier (0.8×–3×)

– Post-eat effects (instant heal, nausea, damage, etc.)

– Emoji indicators (^(^.^)^, (T-T), (x.x), etc.)

All numbers, emojis, and effects can be freely edited in `.minecraft/config/taste_fatigue.json` without recompiling.

• Impact on gameplay

Encourages dietary variety: sticking to one food slows eating and inflicts debuffs, while rotating meals grants benefits. It keeps vanilla pacing intact while adding strategic depth for advanced players.

Drop-in installation for both single-player and servers, no additional dependencies.
